decisions.reasoning: Iran Day 8 sheng ji che di ni zhuan war priced out narrative. US zha qiao liang, yi lang kuo da gong ji zhi Syria/Bahrain. FT han you jing gao oil market close to running on empty. XOM/CVX/COP zhi jie shou yi. Hormuz zhen zheng shou zu = you jia 95+.

-25% shi shang zui da dan ri die fu. CEO Krishna hua AI spending shift to security -- enterprise AI zhi chu canary. Wu xi buy-the-dip, er xi AI enterprise exposure warning. ORCL/CRM deng enterprise AI plays you contagion risk.

4000 breakout = bull trap, sui ji -2%. Iran chong tu xia huang jin wu fa shang sheng -- bi xian gong neng jie gou xing shi xiao. Warsh ying pai + shi zhi shou yi lu gao qi + qiang mei yuan xing cheng duo zhong da ji. Goldman sees central bank floor dan duan qi momentum xiang xia.
